data.name: common.validation
data.value: One or more validation errors occurred.

data.name: common.unexpected
data.value: An unexpected error occurred.

data.name: model.body.invalid
data.value: The request body is invalid.

data.name: model.body.required
data.value: The request body is required.

data.name: model.value.uuid
data.value: The value must be a valid UUID.

data.name: model.value.bool
data.value: The value must be true or false.

data.name: model.value.int
data.value: The value must be a valid integer.

data.name: model.value.number
data.value: The value must be a valid number.

data.name: model.value.datetime
data.value: The value must be a valid date or date-time.

data.name: model.value.invalid
data.value: The value is invalid for this field.

data.name: auth.unauthorized
data.value: Authentication is required to access this resource.

data.name: auth.forbidden
data.value: You do not have permission to access this resource.

data.name: provisioning.country_not_found
data.value: The requested country '{0}' does not exist in the active country catalog.

data.name: SYSTEM_CATALOG_COUNTRY_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Country '{0}' is not active.

data.name: validation.message.language_format_is_invalid
data.value: Language format is invalid.

data.name: validation.message.code_format_is_invalid
data.value: Code format is invalid.

data.name: validation.message.country_contains_invalid_characters
data.value: Country contains invalid characters.

data.name: validation.message.source_contains_invalid_characters
data.value: Source contains invalid characters.

data.name: validation.message.first_name_contains_invalid_characters
data.value: First name contains invalid characters.

data.name: validation.message.last_name_contains_invalid_characters
data.value: Last name contains invalid characters.

data.name: validation.message.role_ids_must_be_unique
data.value: Role ids must be unique.

data.name: validation.message.sortby_is_not_supported
data.value: SortBy is not supported.

data.name: validation.message.minage_cannot_be_greater_than_maxage
data.value: MinAge cannot be greater than MaxAge.

data.name: validation.message.createdfromutc_cannot_be_greater_than_createdtoutc
data.value: CreatedFromUtc cannot be greater than CreatedToUtc.

data.name: validation.message.country_code_must_be_a_2_or_3_letter_iso_style_code
data.value: Country code must be a 2 or 3 letter ISO-style code.
